name: Gumloop
summary: Gumloop is a no-code AI workflow builder with a Free tier (5k credits/month), tiered Pro plan starting at $37/mo, and integrations spanning Slack, Google, and more. Public surfaces audited 2026-04-26.

claims.claim: Verify homepage loads and shows a clear product pitch (hero copy describing what Gumloop does)
claims.evidence: AI agents built for by your team

claims.claim: Verify there is a visible free tier or no-credit-card sign-up CTA on homepage or pricing page
Verify pricing page exists and lists multiple tiered plans with monthly prices
claims.evidence: "Free, Pro, Enterprise" plans are listed with monthly prices such as "$37 / month".

claims.claim: Verify the homepage or product page shows or describes a visual / drag-and-drop pipeline builder (canvas screenshot, animation, or explicit copy)
Verify integrations such as Notion, Slack, Google, OpenAI, or similar are visibly listed on the homepage, integrations page, or footer
claims.evidence: "Google Docs icon, Slack icon" are listed under the templates page.

claims.claim: Verify a public template gallery, examples page, or documentation link is reachable from homepage navigation
claims.evidence: The homepage navigation includes a link to 'Templates'.
